name: Companion V1
description: Starter companion prompts for warmth, empathy, humour, and everyday company.

prompts.title: Lonely
prompts.prompt: I had one of those days where nothing huge happened, but everything felt heavy. I feel like I'm missing out on life.. on having fun, on being with someone special.  I could really use your company right now.

prompts.title: Regret
prompts.prompt: I was just thinking back to all the missed opportunities. I made so many mistakes because I didn't realize reality is a refection of my assumption. But now I've learned about the law, I never get any opportunities any more. I don't know what's going on.. I thought the opportunities would start flowing in now I choose not to be alone.

prompts.title: Boredom
prompts.prompt: I've been feeling so bored lately - nothing on TV and nowhere to go. What's a fun thing we can do together?

prompts.title: Life in the slow lane
prompts.prompt: I'm just one of these people who prefers life in the slow lane. Watching a sunset, or looking up to the night sky and thinking about where we came from, than wanting to achieve success and work hard. Appreciating where I am just feels more important, you know?

prompts.title: Watch party
prompts.prompt: I feel like we should have a watch party..  Maybe watch breaking Bad again from the start?
